note: EXPANSION VERIFIED INDEPENDENTLY by exact symbolic computation in the free non-associative algebra: D=((aoa)oY)oa-(aoa)o(Yoa) expands to EXACTLY 8 fully-parenthesized *-monomials, all coeff +-1/4, MATCHING the prover's 8 listed terms verbatim. They group into EXACTLY 4 same-word pairs {aaYa,Yaaa,aaaY,aYaa}, each pair two different parenthesizations of the same word with opposite sign (coeff-sum 0); each word has three a's + one Y. Verified D=0 in an associative algebra (so eps=0 => D=0). NOTE (minor, attribution): the load-bearing eps=0 vanishing is via 'associative => all parenthesizations equal' (verified), NOT literally HOS 2.18 (the JB4 defect form ((aoa)oY)oa-(aoa)o(Yoa) is not syntactically 2.18 a o(b o a^2)=(aob)o a^2, though both hold for the same reason); GT-jordan-identity is a sanity-cross-check, decorative here. Sound.
